name: @grain/tests-realtime
description: Realtime / SSE conformance tests for Grain's POST /api/chat/stream. The transport is Server-Sent Events ONLY (no WebSocket, no WebRTC), framed as `event:`+`data:` blocks over a long-lived response body. The frontend consumes via fetch+ReadableStream (not EventSource) because EventSource cannot POST. These tests drive the real Hono route in-process via `app.request()`, mock `streamClaude` with scripted async generators or process shims, and assert: event ordering, status-event timing, citation-marker dedupe across chunk boundaries, abort-and-reconnect, server-side error propagation, slow-consumer safety, and the absolute timeout. The chaos suite owns server-side process-tree assertions; realtime owns client-side stream observation.
